titleStmt.title: SII 7.845: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 845. (A.R. No. 218 of 1902). ON A SECOND STONE BUILT INTO THE FLOOR OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . vijayādbhudaya śālivāhana śatavarṣaṁbulu 1554 śrīma(N)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara rājapratāpa rājakaṁṭhī
rava rājamārttāṁḍḍa rājarājānvayābharaṇa rājaśōbhitālaṁkkāra pūrva dakṣaṇa paścama samudrādhīśvara yavvanarājya vibhaṁ
ḍḍana yuvarājasāpanācārya śrī vīrapratāpa rājaśrī khānallikhāna Aṁbbārakhānu sāhēbulugāru tama komāruḍu śi
ddi Aṁbbārukhānuṇṇi tiṁḍḍivanaṁkōṭalō vuṁccagānu Āyana prabhavādisaṁvatsarālalō manmathasaṁvatsaraṁ kārttika bahuḷa
10 sōmavāraṁ vuttarānakṣattraṁ viṣkaṁbhanāmayōgaṁ garajavākaraṇaṁ Amṛtaśiddhayōgaṁ yī śubhadinamaṁdu kōṭalō rā
timaṁḍḍapakaṇajamunnu diḍḍirātimaṁḍḍapamunnu huśenikottaḷamunnu Allikottaḷamunnu kodavakottaḷālunnu cuṭṭukōṭa kaṭṭaṇa
munnu naḍabāvinni Agaḍata tavvaṭaṁ kaṭṭaṇamunnu yivi mōdalaina pani mukhālaṁttā rātikaṭṭaṇaṁ kaṭṭiṁccināḍu Idi Ācaṁdrārkkaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 7.845 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
